codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature contract. The new RunService VAL-EXEC-008 test explicitly records attempted routes and asserts deterministic credential slot order (slot-a then slot-b) plus provider identity continuity and single usage-record behavior. runtime-orchestration-worker SKILL.md now uses the canonical BurnBar* filters from services.yaml and explicitly requires per-command evidence in handoff observations.
